title: hieracium maranzae subsp. subboreale
intro: Hieracium maranzae subsp. subboreale is a rare and lesser-known species of hawkweed, a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hieracium maranzae subsp. subboreale include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially supporting the immune system. It can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, and sometimes dried for use in medicinal tinctures and poultices.
